2_application_mechanism: Supabase SQL Editor, executed manually by the project owner (one single paste, one Run) -- exact mechanism required by the mission. Claude never held or used a Production database connection to write.
4_snapshot_before: data/audits/openserp-serverless-state-prod-snapshot-before.json (counters, hash verification, flag/workflow precheck -- 0 PII, 0 secrets)

7_rls.proof: The applied SQL's own internal verification block (inside the same transaction) asserted pg_class.relrowsecurity=true for both tables via RAISE EXCEPTION-on-failure -- the transaction only reached COMMIT because this passed. Independently, the byte-identical migration SQL (hash-verified) was already live-tested with genuine anon/authenticated/service_role PostgreSQL roles in Gate B (data/audits/openserp-serverless-state-gate-b-seed-reconfirmation.json).

8_policies.proof: Same in-transaction verification block asserted count(*) from pg_policies where tablename in (...) = 0, or the transaction would have rolled back. No anon key is even distributed anywhere in this app's Production config (server-only architecture, confirmed via `vercel env ls production` -- no ANON-named variable exists) -- there is no live browser-facing path to these tables at all, a stronger guarantee than RLS alone.

9_query_states.verification_method: read-only service-role count + distinct-count query post-migration; content shape (query_id/hash-only columns) makes URL/snippet/PII storage structurally impossible -- the table has no such columns

11_second_seed_idempotence.method: controlled environment (per the mission's own 'ou' clause) -- re-applied the exact same, hash-verified manifest a second time against a disposable local PostgreSQL instance immediately before handing it to the user
11_second_seed_idempotence.production_re_run: not performed (not required given the controlled-environment proof; re-running against Production itself was left available but not exercised to avoid an unnecessary second live write action)

13_flags_before_after.verification_limitation: Vercel Sensitive-type vars remain write-only/non-readable via CLI; values confirmed by the user directly, consistent with this migration not touching any Vercel env var at all (SQL-only change)

14_errors_warnings.one_transient_error: First paste attempt failed with a Postgres syntax error on line 1 ('-- OPEN' truncated to nothing by an intermediate copy/view step) -- purely a comment line, zero functional/schema impact, transaction never started executing DDL. Fixed by regenerating the manifest with begin; as the literal first line/token, re-validated end-to-end against a disposable local Postgres, and the corrected file was re-applied successfully by the user.

17_worktree_head.note: Exact HEAD recorded at bilan-write time; see git log for the precise hash. Frozen application code (5afbe1b) unchanged -- only new audit/report/manifest commits added since freeze.

next_decision_pending: Production application deployment of the frozen HEAD (5afbe1b onward), flags still all off. No real cron/write run authorized yet.
